interaction_phrase: wins Prime Minister's award
occurrence_sentence: Japanese Joint Research Group wins Prime Minister's award with computing platform using 64-qubit quantum computer

interaction_phrase: recognized with the Prime Minister's Award
occurrence_sentence: A Japanese research group was recognized with the Prime Minister's Award as part of the 53rd Japan Industrial Technology Awards.

interaction_phrase: Japan's second domestically-made superconducting quantum computer
occurrence_sentence: The team received the award for successful development of a high-performance computing platform that leverages Japan's second domestically-made superconducting quantum computer.

interaction_phrase: Prime Minister's Award
occurrence_sentence: A Japanese research group was recognized with the Prime Minister's Award as part of the 53rd Japan Industrial Technology Awards.

interaction_phrase: including RIKEN
occurrence_sentence: A Japanese consortium of research partners including RIKEN, the National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology (AIST), the National Institute of Information and Communications Technology (NICT), Osaka University, Fujitsu Limited, and Nippon Telegraph and Telephone Corporation (NTT) have been recognized with the prestigious Prime Minister's Award as part of the 53rd Japan Industrial Technology Awards for the successful development of a high-performance computing platform that leverages Japan's second domestically-made superconducting quantum computer.

interaction_phrase: including Fujitsu
occurrence_sentence: A Japanese consortium of research partners including RIKEN, the National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology (AIST), the National Institute of Information and Communications Technology (NICT), Osaka University, Fujitsu Limited, and Nippon Telegraph and Telephone Corporation (NTT) have been recognized with the prestigious Prime Minister's Award as part of the 53rd Japan Industrial Technology Awards for the successful development of a high-performance computing platform that leverages Japan's second domestically-made superconducting quantum computer.

interaction_phrase: jointly developed by Fujitsu and RIKEN
occurrence_sentence: The platform leverages Japan's second domestically-made 64-qubit superconducting quantum computer, which has been offered on the cloud since October 2023 to promote its use for commercial industrial research and development, and jointly developed by Fujitsu and RIKEN based on the know-how for the development of the first domestically-made 64-qubit superconducting quantum computer released in March 2023 by the joint research group.

occurrence_sentence: The platform leverages Japan's second domestically-made 64-qubit superconducting quantum computer, which has been offered on the cloud since October 2023 to promote its use for commercial industrial research and development, and jointly developed by Fujitsu and RIKEN based on the know-how for the development of the first domestically-made 64-qubit superconducting quantum computer released in March 2023 by the joint research group.

interaction_phrase: unveiled Japan's second superconducting quantum computer
occurrence_sentence: RIKEN and Fujitsu also unveiled Japan's second superconducting quantum computer, based on the technology of the first superconducting quantum computer, on the cloud for industrial research and development in 2021, two and a half years after they established the RIKEN RQC-Fujitsu Collaboration Center.

interaction_phrase: established the RIKEN RQC-Fujitsu Collaboration Center
occurrence_sentence: RIKEN and Fujitsu also unveiled Japan's second superconducting quantum computer, based on the technology of the first superconducting quantum computer, on the cloud for industrial research and development in 2021, two and a half years after they established the RIKEN RQC-Fujitsu Collaboration Center.

interaction_phrase: superconducting quantum computer is provided as part of a hybrid quantum computing platform
occurrence_sentence: RIKEN and Fujitsu's superconducting quantum computer is provided as part of a hybrid quantum computing platform that also supports Fujitsu's 40-qubit quantum simulator, which remains one of the largest scale simulators in the world ([1](https://www.fujitsu.com/global/about/resources/news/press-releases/2024/0315-01.html#footnote1)).

interaction_phrase: unveiled Japan's second superconducting quantum computer
occurrence_sentence: RIKEN and Fujitsu also unveiled Japan's second superconducting quantum computer, based on the technology of the first superconducting quantum computer, on the cloud for industrial research and development in 2021, two and a half years after they established the RIKEN RQC-Fujitsu Collaboration Center.

interaction_phrase: established the RIKEN RQC-Fujitsu Collaboration Center
occurrence_sentence: RIKEN and Fujitsu also unveiled Japan's second superconducting quantum computer, based on the technology of the first superconducting quantum computer, on the cloud for industrial research and development in 2021, two and a half years after they established the RIKEN RQC-Fujitsu Collaboration Center.

interaction_phrase: Japan's original quantum technologies
occurrence_sentence: These milestones highlight the rapid progress and innovative potential of Japan's original quantum technologies, which are now demonstrating the ability to withstand the demands of the first stages of industrial application.

interaction_phrase: RIKEN and Fujitsu's superconducting quantum computer
occurrence_sentence: RIKEN and Fujitsu's superconducting quantum computer is provided as part of a hybrid quantum computing platform that also supports Fujitsu's 40-qubit quantum simulator, which remains one of the largest scale simulators in the world ([1](https://www.fujitsu.com/global/about/resources/news/press-releases/2024/0315-01.html#footnote1)).

interaction_phrase: the joint research group will continue to promote the social implementation of quantum computing
occurrence_sentence: The joint research group will continue to promote the social implementation of quantum computing by leveraging the strengths of each organization.

interaction_phrase: Quantum Leap Flagship Program
occurrence_sentence: This work was supported by Japanese Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology's Quantum Leap Flagship Program (MEXT Q-LEAP) "Research and Development of Superconducting Quantum Computers"
